features.name: Niche researcher: query Market Research API /api/research/{platform}/search for top posts + creators given goal
Hook extractor: Claude analyzes top posts and extracts reusable hook patterns + content frameworks to knowledge base
Competitor mapper: identify top 5 accounts and store in Supabase company_competitors table with handle + platform
Tweet generator: given hook + product context, Claude generates 5 tweet variants (thread + standalone) as JSON list
Caption generator: platform-aware captions for Instagram/Threads/LinkedIn from same brief (respecting char limits)
Content scorer: Claude scores each variant on hook strength, clarity, CTA (1-10); filter out scores < 6
Twitter poster: POST to Safari automation port 3007 /api/twitter/comments/post with top-scoring tweet content
Instagram poster: POST to port 3005 with best caption variant (respects 3/day rate limit)
Threads poster: POST to port 3004 with threads-optimized variant (respects 5/day rate limit)
DM campaign: generate personalized DMs for warm CRM leads (score >= 50) and dispatch via port 3003
Metrics collector: after 1h and 24h, record engagement (likes, views, replies) from post URLs in company_post_metrics
Performance classifier: label each post viral (>500 eng) / good (>100) / average (>20) / flop (<20)
Campaign summary: write to Supabase company_campaigns table (goal, posts, reach, top_post, classification)
Best-post analyzer: weekly review of top performers → extract what worked → update hook_library.json
A/B tester: run 2 content variants per campaign, compare 24h results, persist winner's framework to knowledge base
Marketing knowledge base: append campaign lessons to knowledge/marketing-playbook.md after each campaign run
Rate limiter: enforce per-platform daily post limits; skip platform and log warning if limit hit
Marketing log: append each marketing action to logs/marketing-agent.jsonl with ts, platform, content_id, result
Marketing CLI: python marketing_agent.py --goal '...' --platform twitter --dry-run (prints plan without executing)
